subcodes.first_line: The first Light that shone forth and gleamed from the horizon of the heaven of mercy of our Lord, the Lord of all creation, and the first Splendor that flashed forth and radiated from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول نور اشرق و لاح من افق سماء رحمه ربنا مولی الوری و اول بهاء برق و الاح من
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for forgiveness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
